content: Vercel + Vite SPA in Bun monorepo: set Root Directory to 'apps/web' in Vercel dashboard (not monorepo root). Build command: 'bun run build' (vite build). Output dir: 'dist'. SPA rewrites — create apps/web/vercel.json with { 'rewrites': [{ 'source': '/(.*)', 'destination': '/index.html' }] }. Env vars: VITE_* prefix required for Vite to expose them at build time (e.g. VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_API_BASE_URL). Bun workspaces supported by Vercel for skipping unaffected projects. CORS is on the Railway API side (already configured via WEB_ORIGIN env var in Phase 8). No vercel functions needed — pure static SPA. install command: 'bun install' from monorepo root (or leave default). Vercel CLI version available: check with vercel --version.
